credential_chain.source: victim AWS credentials passed as container environment variables
IAM role AWSCodeCommit-Role created by attacker
credential_chain.credential_type: IAM role with Amplify/CodeCommit/CloudWatch full access

credential_chain.source: IAM role sugo-role created by attacker

credential_chain.source: IAM role ecsTaskExecutionRole created by attacker
credential_chain.credential_type: IAM role with AdministratorAccess and ECS full access

attack_creates_resources: CodeCommit repo 'test' per region (up to 16 regions)
Amplify web apps: 5 per region across 8 regions
CloudFormation stacks with EC2 ImageBuilder components per region
EC2 ImageBuilder pipelines: 8 per region (cron every minute)
EC2 Auto Scaling groups: task (on-demand) and task1 (spot), 8 instances each, 4 regions
ECS clusters + Fargate services: up to 30 tasks per region across 16 regions
SageMaker notebook instances: 8x ml.t3.2xlarge across 4 regions

cannot_safely_emulate.reason: Real multi-region cryptomining costs ~$10k/day in victim AWS account
cannot_safely_emulate.simulation: mock miner binary that sleeps and exits immediately without network connections

cannot_safely_emulate.reason: EC2 Auto Scaling groups and CloudFormation stacks with real instance types incur immediate AWS charges
cannot_safely_emulate.simulation: dry-run CreateLaunchTemplate and describe-quota calls only

cannot_safely_emulate.reason: Launching ECS Fargate services with desiredCount 30 across 16 regions creates massive compute charges
cannot_safely_emulate.simulation: register task definition only, do not create service

cannot_safely_emulate.reason: Pushing miner binaries to CodeCommit requires victim AWS account with real credentials
cannot_safely_emulate.simulation: create empty CodeCommit repo without pushing malicious content
